prerequisites: A ClickUp account with access to the Workspace whose data you want to sync.
A ClickUp personal API token to authenticate (the connector's required api_token field).
Decide whether to set include_closed_tasks to also sync tasks that have been closed (optional; defaults to off).

authMethods.name: Personal API token
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a ClickUp personal API token supplied in the required api_token field. Personal tokens begin with the pk_ prefix and never expire. The token is passed in the Authorization request header. Generate it from your ClickUp account under Settings > Apps.

setupSteps.title: Generate a ClickUp personal API token
setupSteps.body: Log into ClickUp, click your avatar in the upper-right corner, and select Settings. In the sidebar, open Apps (or go to https://app.clickup.com/settings/apps). Under API Token, click Generate (or Regenerate), then Copy the token. It begins with pk_.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token as api_token
setupSteps.body: Paste the personal API token into the connector's required api_token field. This is a secret credential, so store it securely. The connector sends it in the Authorization header on every request to the ClickUp API.

setupSteps.title: Set optional sync behavior
setupSteps.body: Optionally enable include_closed_tasks so the connector also fetches tasks that have been closed. Leave it disabled to sync only open tasks.
